content.cn_text: 梅根和肯正在决定晚上怎么过。请看听力测试的第一部分。现在你有一些时间阅读问题1至问题7。你会看到有一个已经为你做过的例子。首先播放与此相关的对话。
content.en_text: Megan and Ken are deciding how they will spend the evening. Look at section 1 of your listening test. You have some time to look at Questions 1 to 7 now. You will see that there is an example which has been done for you. The conversation relating to this will be played first.

content.cn_text: 电话响了
content.en_text: Telephone rings

content.cn_text: 梅根:你好。梅金说。
content.en_text: Megan: Hello. Megan speaking.

content.cn_text: 肯:你好，梅根。
content.en_text: Ken: Hello Megan.

content.cn_text: 梅根:你好，肯。很高兴你打电话来。托马斯让我给你他的电话号码。
content.en_text: Megan: Hello Ken. I'm glad you called. Thomas asked me to give you his telephone number.

content.cn_text: 肯:那是他办公室的电话还是家里的电话?
content.en_text: Ken: Is that his office number or his home number?

content.cn_text: 梅根:我可以两样都给你。他的新家庭电话号码是例9452 3456。你要他办公室的电话号码吗?
content.en_text: Megan: I can give you both. His new home number is Example 9452 3456. Would you like his office number?

content.cn_text: 肯:我想我有。9731 4322听起来对吗?
content.en_text: Ken: I think I have it. Does 9731 4322 sound right?

content.cn_text: 梅根:就是这样。但家里的电话号码是9452 3456。他上周搬进来的。
content.en_text: Megan: That's it. But the home number is 9452 3456. He moved in last week.

content.cn_text: 肯:好。我知道了。现在，你想做什么?
content.en_text: Ken: Good. I've got that. Now, what would you like to do?

content.cn_text: 旁白:托马斯的家庭电话号码是9452 3456，所以字母C已经圈起来了。现在我们开始吧。你应该边听边回答问题，因为你不会听到第二次问题。首先，你还有机会看看问题1至问题7。现在仔细听录音，回答问题1至问题7。
content.en_text: Narrator: Thomas's home telephone number is 9452 3456 so letter C has been circled.Now we shall begin. You should answer the questions as you listen because you will not hear the questions a second time. First, you have another chance to look at questions 1 to 7. Now listen carefully and answer questions 1 to 7.

content.cn_text: 电话响了
content.en_text: Telephone rings

content.cn_text: 梅根:你好。梅金说。
content.en_text: Megan: Hello. Megan speaking.

content.cn_text: 肯:你好，梅根。
content.en_text: Ken: Hello Megan.

content.cn_text: 梅根:你好，肯。很高兴你打电话来。托马斯让我给你他的电话号码。
content.en_text: Megan: Hello Ken. I'm glad you called. Thomas asked me to give you his telephone number.

content.cn_text: 肯:那是他办公室的电话还是家里的电话?
content.en_text: Ken: Is that his office number or his home number?

content.cn_text: 梅根:我可以两样都给你。他的新家号码是9452 3456。你要他办公室的电话号码吗?
content.en_text: Megan: I can give you both. His new home number is 9452 3456. Would you like his office number?

content.cn_text: 肯:我想我有。9731 4322听起来对吗?
content.en_text: Ken: I think I have it. Does 9731 4322 sound right?

content.cn_text: 梅根:就是这样。但家里的电话号码是9452 3456。他上周搬进来的。
content.en_text: Megan: That's it. But the home number is 9452 3456. He moved in last week.

content.cn_text: 肯:好。我知道了。现在，你想做什么?
content.en_text: Ken: Good. I've got that. Now, what would you like to do?

content.cn_text: 旁白:托马斯的家庭电话号码是9452 3456，所以字母C已经圈起来了。现在我们开始吧。你应该边听边回答，因为你不会听到第二次问题。首先，你还有机会看看问题1至问题7。现在仔细听录音，回答问题1至问题7。
content.en_text: Narrator: Thomas's home telephone number is 9452 3456 so letter C has been circled.Now we shall begin. You should answer the recording as you listen because you will not hear the questions a second time. First, you have another chance to look at questions 1 to 7. Now listen carefully and answer questions 1 to 7.

content.cn_text: 电话响了
content.en_text: Telephone rings

content.cn_text: 梅根:你好。梅金说。
content.en_text: Megan: Hello. Megan speaking.

content.cn_text: 肯:你好，梅根。
content.en_text: Ken: Hello Megan.

content.cn_text: 梅根:你好，肯。很高兴你打电话来。托马斯让我给你他的电话号码。
content.en_text: Megan: Hello Ken. I'm glad you called. Thomas asked me to give you his telephone number.

content.cn_text: 肯:那是他办公室的电话还是家里的电话?
content.en_text: Ken: Is that his office number or his home number?

content.cn_text: 梅根:我可以两样都给你。他的新家号码是9452 3456。你要他办公室的电话号码吗?
content.en_text: Megan: I can give you both. His new home number is 9452 3456. Would you like his office number?

content.cn_text: 肯:我想我有。9731 4322听起来对吗?
content.en_text: Ken: I think I have it. Does 9731 4322 sound right?

content.cn_text: 梅根:就是这样。但家里的电话号码是9452 3456。他上周搬进来的。
content.en_text: Megan: That's it. But the home number is 9452 3456. He moved in last week.

content.cn_text: 肯:好。我知道了。现在，你想做什么?
content.en_text: Ken: Good. I've got that. Now, what would you like to do?

content.cn_text: 梅根:嗯，我想去跳舞，但是简扭伤了脚踝，所以她不想去了。
content.en_text: Megan: Well, I'd like to go dancing, but Jane's hurt her ankle so she'd rather not.

content.cn_text: 肯:真遗憾。我猜这意味着她也不想打网球了。
content.en_text: Ken: That's a pity. I guess it means she doesn't want to play tennis, either.

content.cn_text: 梅根:没错。她说如果我们不指望她打得好，去打保龄球也没关系。
content.en_text: Megan: That's right. She says it's okay to go bowling if we don't expect her to do well.

content.cn_text: 肯:好吧，我们开始吧!我想我们可以改天再去跳舞。
content.en_text: Ken: Okay, let's do it! I guess we can go dancing another time.

content.cn_text: 梅根:嗯，我在娱乐城的保龄球馆订了时间。你知道吗?
content.en_text: Megan: Well, I booked us some time at the bowling alley of Entertainment City. Do you know it?

content.cn_text: 肯:是在大学附近的史密斯街吗?
content.en_text: Ken: Is it on Smith Street, down near the university?

content.cn_text: 梅根:没错。它在史密斯街和大桥路的拐角处。
content.en_text: Megan: That's right. It's on the comer of Smith Street and Bridge Road.

content.cn_text: 肯:你订了什么时间的?
content.en_text: Ken: What time did you book for?

content.cn_text: 梅根:我能订到的第一个座位是8点。
content.en_text: Megan: The first booking I could get was 8 o'clock.

content.cn_text: 肯:好的。现在是7点。你想先做什么?
content.en_text: Ken: Okay. It's 7 now. What do you want to do first?

content.cn_text: 梅根:嗯，我想我们现在该走了。我们可以在保龄球馆见面。
content.en_text: Megan: Well, I think we should leave now. We can meet at the bowling alley.

content.cn_text: 肯:我没那么快。首先我得给托马斯打个电话，我得换身衣服。
content.en_text: Ken: I can't be that quick. I have to call Thomas, to start with, and I need to get changed.

content.cn_text: 梅根:好的。我想我十分钟后就走，在那里见。
content.en_text: Megan: Okay. I think I'll leave in ten minutes and meet you in there.

content.cn_text: 肯:有道理。我坐我的车去，所以我会很快的。我半小时后就出去。
content.en_text: Ken: That makes sense. I'll take my car, so I'll be quite quick. I'll be out of here in half an hour.

content.cn_text: 梅根:好的。你有辆车真是太幸运了!你可以很容易地四处走动。
content.en_text: Megan: Okay. You're so lucky to have a car! You can get around so easily.

content.cn_text: 肯:嗯，对也不对。我经常花很长时间开车到处找公园。交通可能会很糟糕。
content.en_text: Ken: Well, yes and no. I often spend ages driving around trying to find a park. The traffic can be very bad.

content.cn_text: 梅根:嗯，那对我来说不成问题，因为我要坐公共汽车。它直接经过我的门，我有足够的时间。
content.en_text: Megan: Well, that won't be a problem for me, because I'll take the bus. It goes right past my door, and I'll have plenty of time.

content.cn_text: 肯:听起来不错。还有谁要来?
content.en_text: Ken: Sounds good. Who else is coming?

content.cn_text: 梅根:我想下午课上的几乎每个人都会去。
content.en_text: Megan: I think nearly everyone from the afternoon class will be there.

content.cn_text: 肯:哪门课?是数学课，还是下午的辅导课?
content.en_text: Ken: Which class? The big maths class, or the afternoon tutorial?

content.cn_text: 梅根:数学课。更重要的是，如果数量多，我们会有优惠!
content.en_text: Megan: The maths class. What's more, we get a concession for large numbers!

content.cn_text: 肯:那很好。我想把这个月的开支控制在最低限度。
content.en_text: Ken: That's good. I'm trying to keep my expenses down this month.

content.cn_text: 梅根:我也是。我估计今晚要花20美元左右。肯:你一定很会理财。我预计它会达到……嗯……将近40美元!那你要怎么处理呢?
content.en_text: Megan: So am I. I expect tonight 'll cost about $20. Ken: You must be good with money. I expect it to come to… um … nearly $40! So how are you going to manage that?

content.cn_text: 梅根:嗯，公共汽车很便宜，如果我早点回家，我就没有时间花太多钱了!无论如何，我明天早上得早起，所以我最好在11点左右到家。
content.en_text: Megan: Well, the bus is cheap, and if I come home early I won't have time to spend too much! In any case, I have to be up early tomorrow morning, so I'd really better try to get home by about 11.

content.cn_text: 肯:这倒提醒了我。我得替我妈妈给出租车公司打电话。再见,梅根。待会儿见。
content.en_text: Ken: That reminds me. I have to phone the taxi company for my mother. Goodbye, Megan.I'll see you later.

content.cn_text: 梅根:再见，肯。
content.en_text: Megan: Goodbye, Ken.

content.cn_text: 电话挂断的声音。
content.en_text: Sound of phone hanging up.

content.cn_text: 旁白:肯打电话给出租车公司。听录音，准备回答问题5和问题9。现在听一段电话录音，准备回答问题8和9。
content.en_text: Narrator: Ken calls the taxi company. Listen and be ready to answer questions S and 9.Now listen to the telephone call and be ready to answer questions 8 and 9.

content.cn_text: 有人拨号的声音，羽毛在响
content.en_text: Sound of somebody dialling, plume ringing

content.cn_text: 男人的声音:你好，这里是Acme出租车公司。请按照磁带上的说明去做。
content.en_text: Man's voice: Hello, this is Acme Cabs. Please follow the instructions on the tape.

content.cn_text: 如果您想现在叫出租车，请按1。
content.en_text: If you wish to order a cab now, press 1.

content.cn_text: 如果您之前已经下过订单，请按2。
content.en_text: If you have placed an order previously, press 2.

content.cn_text: 如果你想提前订购，请按3。请准备好告诉我们你的街道号码和名字。
content.en_text: If you wish to make an advance order, Press 3. Please be ready to tell us your street number and name.

content.cn_text: 如果你想和无线电室主管通话，请按4。
content.en_text: If you wish to speak to the radio room supervisor, press 4.

content.cn_text: 问9如欲查询失物，请按5。
content.en_text: If you want to enquire about lost property, press 5.

content.cn_text: 如果你想叫一辆可以载轮椅的出租车，请按6。
content.en_text: If you want to order a taxi equipped to carry wheelchairs, press 6.

content.cn_text: 你的电话很重要。请不要挂断电话，等待下一个有空的接单员。
content.en_text: Your call is very important. Please stay on the line for the next available order taker.

content.cn_text: 点击显示一个真人在那里。
content.en_text: Click lo indicate a real person is there.

content.cn_text: 肯:你好。我想我周四把东西落在你们的出租车里了。那是一个牛皮纸包裹，上面用绿色墨水写着一个地址。有人交了吗?
content.en_text: Ken: Hello. I think I left something in one of your cabs on Thursday. It was a brown paper package with an address written on it in green ink. Has anyone handed it in?

groups.desc:
Questions 1-7
Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.

items.title: What will Ken and Megan do this evening?
items.analysis: 通过对话内容可以看出，虽然Megan最初想去跳舞，但由于Jane受伤，他们讨论了其他选项。最终，Ken同意了Megan提出的保龄球建议，说"Okay, let's do it!"，并表示可以改天再去跳舞。这清楚地表明他们决定晚上去打保龄球。

items.title: Where is Entertainment City?
items.analysis: 文中明确指出Entertainment City位于Smith Street和Bridge Road的拐角处。这个描述非常具体和准确，直接回答了题目询问的位置。对话中先提到了Smith Street靠近大学的位置，但随后给出了更精确的信息，即街道交叉口的位置，这是最终的正确答案。

items.title: When will Ken leave?
items.analysis: Ken明确表示他将在半小时后离开，这与选项D "in 30 minutes" 完全一致。半小时等于30分钟，因此D选项是正确答案。Ken的这个陈述直接回答了题干中询问的"When will Ken leave?"（Ken什么时候会离开？）

items.title: How will Megan travel to Entertainment City?
items.analysis: Megan明确表示她会乘坐公交车去Entertainment City。她说公交车会经过她家门口，而且她有足够的时间。这直接回答了问题"How will Megan travel to Entertainment City?"，因此正确答案是选项A，即乘坐公交车。

items.title: How many people will they meet there?
items.analysis: 文中Megan提到"nearly everyone from the afternoon class will be there"，这清楚地表明将会有一群人参加，而不是仅仅两三个人。"nearly everyone"意味着大部分班级成员都会到场，这符合选项D "a group"的描述。因此，正确答案是D，表示他们将在那里遇到一群人。

items.title: How much will the evening cost?
items.analysis: 正确答案是C（less than $40.00），因为Megan预计花费20美元，而Ken预计花费接近40美元。考虑到他们提到的团体优惠，实际花费很可能会低于Ken的预估。综合两人的预计，可以合理推断实际花费会低于40美元但高于20美元。这要求考生能够综合理解两个说话人的观点，并做出合理判断。

items.title: What time does Megan plan to come home?
items.analysis: Megan明确表示她打算在晚上11点左右回家。11点显然是在午夜之前，因此正确答案是A（before midnight）。Megan给出这个时间的原因是她第二天早上要早起，这进一步支持了她会在午夜之前回家的推断。

groups.desc:
Questions 8-9
Write ONE NUMBER for each answer

items.title:
Which telephone button will Ken press
if he wishes to order a cab for later?
items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于理解"order a cab for later"和"make an advance order"之间的对应关系。题目中的"for later"表示将来的某个时间，这与听力中的"advance order"（提前预订）概念一致。录音中明确说明按3是用于提前预订，这正是题目所问的情况。因此，正确答案是3。注意，不要混淆与现在订车（按1）或之前已订车（按2）的选项。做这类题目时，要仔细听辨与时间相关的表述，并迅速将其与题目要求对应起来。

items.title: if he has lost something in a cab?
items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于理解题干中的"lost something"与录音中的"lost property"之间的联系。录音中给出了多个选项，每个选项对应一个数字。当你听到"If you want to enquire about lost property, press 5"时，这就是我们需要的答案。因为询问丢失物品正是题目所问的情况，而对应的数字就是5。所以，正确答案是5。要注意的是，虽然录音中提到了其他数字，但它们都不是与丢失物品相关的选项。因此，做这类题目时，要仔细听完整个录音，不要急于选择最先听到的数字。
